allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\Personal Projects\\Closet" -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match '\\.\(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|gif\)$' } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\jyoti\\Downloads" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N="Size \(MB\)";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length / 1MB, 1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($free = [math]::Round\(\(Get-PSDrive C\).Free / 1GB, 2\); Write-Output "Free space on C: $free GB")
Bash(node -e "const {readData,writeData}=require\('./lib/db'\); const d=readData\(\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('wishlist end line exists:', !!d.wishlist\)")
